mano_cua.result_summary: 自动类型加载功能正常。输入import express后5秒内红色波浪线消失，右侧面板显示@types/express:5.0.6和express-serve-static-core:0.1.1，hover显示完整类型签名和JSDoc。lodash同样正确加载@types/lodash:4.17.24。无Module not found错误。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All type definitions loaded correctly for both express and lodash, including cross-package dependency resolution.

deploy_notes.workaround: Lerna monorepo with yarn workspaces. Dev server on port 4000 not 3000.
